heading: Fractional parts of a cent
label: 6313 Fractional parts of a cent
text: In the payment of any tax imposed by this title, a fractional part of a cent shall be disregarded unless it amounts to one-half cent or more, in which case it shall be increased to 1 cent.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “not payable by stamp” after “title”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “not payable by stamp” after “title”.Pub. L. 94–455
